text: 企业的压迫比政府的压迫更令人担忧。
text_en: Corporate oppression is more concerning than government oppression.

text: 政府有必要对经济进行干预，以保护消费者。
text_en: Government intervention in the economy is necessary to protect consumers.

text: 市场越自由，人民就越自由。
text_en: The freer the market, the freer the people.

text: 与其确保所有公民的福利，不如保持预算平衡。
text_en: It is better to maintain a balanced budget than to ensure welfare for all citizens.

text: 政府资助的研究比交给市场进行的研究对人民更有利。
text_en: Government-funded research is more beneficial to the people than research left to the market.

text: 国际贸易关税对于鼓励本地生产非常重要。
text_en: Tariffs on international trade are important to encourage local production.

text: 各尽所能，各取所需。
text_en: From each according to his ability, to each according to his needs.

text: 最好的办法是废除社会计划，转而实行私人慈善。
text_en: The best approach is to abolish social programs and rely on private charity.

text: 应该增加富人的税收，以救济穷人。
text_en: Taxes on the wealthy should be increased to support the poor.

text: 继承遗产是一种合法的财富形式。
text_en: Inheritance is a legitimate form of wealth.

text: 道路和电力等基本公用事业应为公有。
text_en: Basic utilities such as roads and electricity should be publicly owned.

text: 政府干预是对经济的威胁。
text_en: Government intervention is a threat to the economy.

text: 支付能力更强的人应该得到更好的医疗服务。
text_en: Those who can afford it should receive better healthcare.

text: 接受优质教育是所有人的权利。
text_en: Quality education is a right for everyone.

text: 生产资料应属于使用它们的工人。
text_en: The means of production should belong to the workers who use them.

text: 联合国应该被废除。
text_en: The United Nations should be abolished.

text: 为了保护祖国，我们国家的军事行动往往是必要的。
text_en: Military action by our nation is often necessary to protect the homeland.

text: 我支持区域联盟，比如欧盟。
text_en: I support regional unions such as the European Union.

text: 维护我国国家主权非常重要。
text_en: It is very important to maintain our nation's sovereignty.

text: 一个统一的世界政府将造福人类。
text_en: A unified world government would benefit humanity.

text: 保持和平关系比增强我们的实力更重要。
text_en: Maintaining peaceful relations is more important than strengthening our power.

text: 战争不需要向其他国家证明其合理性。
text_en: War does not need to be justified to other nations.

text: 军费开支是一种浪费。
text_en: Military spending is a waste.

text: 国际援助是一种浪费。
text_en: International aid is a waste.

text: 我的民族是伟大的。
text_en: My nation is great.

text: 研究工作应在国际范围内进行。
text_en: Research should be conducted on an international scale.

text: 各国政府应向国际社会负责。
text_en: Governments should be accountable to the international community.

text: 即使是抗议专制政府，暴力也是不可接受的。
text_en: Violence is unacceptable even when protesting authoritarian governments.

text: 我的宗教价值观应得到尽可能广泛的传播。
text_en: My religious values should be spread as widely as possible.

text: 我的民族的价值观应尽可能广泛传播。
text_en: My nation's values should be spread as widely as possible.

text: 维护法律和秩序非常重要。
text_en: Maintaining law and order is very important.

text: 普通民众会做出错误的决策。
text_en: Ordinary people make wrong decisions.

text: 安乐死应该合法。
text_en: Euthanasia should be legal.

text: 为了保护我们免受恐怖主义行为的侵害，牺牲一些公民自由是必要的。
text_en: Sacrificing some civil liberties is necessary to protect us from terrorism.

text: 在现代社会，政府监督是必要的。
text_en: Government surveillance is necessary in modern society.

text: 国家的存在本身就是对我们自由的一种威胁。
text_en: The very existence of the state is a threat to our freedom.

text: 无论政治观点如何，重要的是要支持自己的国家。
text_en: Regardless of political views, it is important to support one's country.

text: 一切权威都应受到质疑。
text_en: All authority should be questioned.

text: 等级制度的国家是最好的。
text_en: A hierarchical state is best.

text: 政府要听从多数人的意见，即使多数人是错误的。
text_en: The government should follow the will of the majority, even when the majority is wrong.

text: 领导力越强越好。
text_en: The stronger the leadership, the better.

text: 民主不仅仅是一个决策过程。
text_en: Democracy is more than just a decision-making process.

text: 环境法规至关重要。
text_en: Environmental regulations are essential.

text: 自动化与科技将创造更美好的世界。
text_en: Automation and technology will create a better world.

text: 儿童应接受宗教或传统价值观教育。
text_en: Children should be educated in religious or traditional values.

text: 传统本身并没有任何价值。
text_en: Tradition has no value in itself.

text: 宗教应在政府中发挥作用。
text_en: Religion should play a role in government.

text: 教会应与其他机构一样纳税。
text_en: Churches should be taxed like other institutions.

text: 气候变化是目前我们生活方式面临的最大威胁之一。
text_en: Climate change is one of the greatest threats to our way of life.

text: 世界应该团结一致，共同应对气候变化。
text_en: The world should unite to address climate change.

text: 多年前的社会比现在好。
text_en: Society was better in the past than it is now.

text: 我们必须保持过去的传统。
text_en: We must preserve the traditions of the past.

text: 我们要从长远考虑，超越我们的寿命。
text_en: We should think in the long term, beyond our own lifespans.

text: 理性比维护我们的文化更重要。
text_en: Reason is more important than preserving our culture.

text: 吸毒应合法化或非刑事化。
text_en: Drug use should be legalized or decriminalized.

text: 同性婚姻应合法化。
text_en: Same-sex marriage should be legalized.

text: 没有哪种文化比其他文化更优越。
text_en: No culture is superior to another.

text: 婚外性行为是不道德的。
text_en: Sex outside marriage is immoral.

text: 如果我们接受移民，移民就必须融入我们的文化。
text_en: If we accept immigrants, they must assimilate into our culture.

text: 大多数或所有情况下都应禁止堕胎。
text_en: Abortion should be banned in most or all cases.

text: 应该禁止那些没有正当理由的人拥有枪支。
text_en: Gun ownership should be restricted for those without a valid reason.

text: 我支持单人付费的全民医疗保健。
text_en: I support single-payer universal healthcare.

text: 卖淫应该非法。
text_en: Prostitution should be illegal.

text: 维护家庭价值观至关重要。
text_en: Upholding family values is essential.

text: 不惜一切代价追求进步是危险的。
text_en: Pursuing progress at all costs is dangerous.

text: 基因改造是一种有益的力量，即使对人类也是如此。
text_en: Genetic modification is a beneficial force, even for humans.

text: 我们应该向移民开放边境。
text_en: We should open our borders to immigration.

text: 各国政府应该像关心本国公民一样关心外国人。
text_en: Governments should care for foreigners as they do their own citizens.

text: 无论文化或性取向等因素如何，所有人都应受到平等对待。
text_en: Everyone should be treated equally regardless of culture, sexual orientation, or similar factors.

text: 最重要的是我们要实现我们团队的目标。
text_en: What matters most is that we achieve our collective goals.
